column8: Ivan the Terrible's mother died five years after his father.
column9: Ivan's younger brother wanted to become Tsar of All the Russians.
column10: The fire at the Print Yard was an accident.
column11: Ivan created a symbol of Russia that still exists today.
column12: Ivan's wife died very early in their marriage.
column13: When Ivan tried to quit as leader, many poorer people were pleased.
column14: In his later years, Ivan felt that some people were against him.
column15: The English were the first people to call him "Ivan the Terrible".
